What I offer

Graphic Design
Logos, brand kits, social graphics, posters, and Canva/Figma templates — designed with intention and built to last.
Social Media Management
Content calendars, platform strategy, Reels/TikTok editing, community engagement, and organic growth on Instagram & TikTok.
Virtual Assistant
Email management, inbox organization, scheduling, CRM data entry, and administrative operations handled with precision.
Content Creation
Short-form video editing and aesthetic visual assets tailored to current lifestyle and product marketing trends that drive views.
Marketing Strategy
Data-backed content planning, brand messaging, campaign execution, and promotional material production across channels.
UI/UX Design
User-centered mobile app prototypes and wireframes in Figma, applying UX principles for intuitive, research-driven digital experiences.
